lint.note: Legacy NiceGUI imports remain in milestone-3 page files: src/ui/pages/scripts.py, src/ui/pages/review.py, src/ui/pages/matrix.py.

blockingIssues.description: src/ui/app.py wires Manage and Settings page builders from later features instead of keeping all five tab builders as placeholder stub controls, violating the feature-2.2 contract boundary.
src/ui/pages/settings.py deletes the current project but does not trigger app-level rebuild/navigation, leaving the UI able to show stale controls for a deleted project.

rejectedObservations.observation: The reviewer instructions say to read `.factory/library/architecture.md`, but this repository's `.factory/library/` only contains `patterns.md` and `user-testing.md`.
Mission guidance should more strongly reinforce not pulling in later-feature integrations when validating intermediate milestone slices.
rejectedObservations.reason: recommendation belongs to orchestrator but evidence is limited to a single feature and not clearly systemic
